creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
I would like to request an experimental build of all ports with the
attached patch applied against bsd.port.mk.

	Change description:

	 - Switch from OpenLDAP 2.3 to 2.4 as default OpenLDAP implementation;
	   with the results we will be able to decide whether switching at this
	   point is a right move before actually doing it.
	 - Remove OpenLDAP 2.2 series support.  The port has been removed long ago
	   so this part should be no-op.
